title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Vodafone Idea Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vodafone Idea Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Vodafone Idea Holdings Services:
Vodafone Idea Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea Holdings Services!
